name: Fettunta
recipeIngredient: 2 Cloves Garlic, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill bread on each side until toasted on rack over grill with some wood chips or fruit wood pieces added to coals to give smoke.
2. Rub each slice of toasted bread with cut garlic clove (guests may do this).
3. Sprinkle each slice lightly with salt.
4. Drizzle each slice liberally with olive oil.
5. Serve while still warm.
Makes 8 fettunta
